passages.cleanText: Day 3

passages.text: Regretfully, you wake up. [[3.3]]
passages.cleanText: Regretfully, you wake up.

passages.text: It took a long time to go to bed last night, and even then you never really *slept*.  [[3.4]]
passages.cleanText: It took a long time to go to bed last night, and even then you never really *slept*.

passages.text: But duty calls, and the mail doesn't wait for anybody. Time to get up. [[3.5]]
passages.cleanText: But duty calls, and the mail doesn't wait for anybody. Time to get up.

passages.text: The honey tea is hot, smells sweet, and tastes terrible. [[3.6]]
passages.cleanText: The honey tea is hot, smells sweet, and tastes terrible.

passages.text: But you feel like your head is cleared, at least. [[3.7]]
passages.cleanText: But you feel like your head is cleared, at least.

passages.text: Is there something else in this stuff? [[3.8]]
passages.cleanText: Is there something else in this stuff?

passages.text: The tea doesn't respond. [[3.9]]
passages.cleanText: The tea doesn't respond.

passages.text: You have a doctor's appointment later today. But first you have to deliver the mail. [[3.10]]
passages.cleanText: You have a doctor's appointment later today. But first you have to deliver the mail.

passages.text: Today, there are letters for Matthew, Ms. Buttons, and Mr. Scotch. [[3.11]]
passages.cleanText: Today, there are letters for Matthew, Ms. Buttons, and Mr. Scotch.

passages.text: You decide to take the backstreet way onto Casserole Avenue to Matthew's house. [[3.12]]
passages.cleanText: You decide to take the backstreet way onto Casserole Avenue to Matthew's house.

passages.text:
Hey Marty. What's up? 
[["Not much" -> 3.13]]
[["Nothing important" -> 3.13]]
passages.cleanText: Hey Marty. What's up?

passages.text:
Come on, there must be *something*. 
[["There really isn't" -> 3.14a]]
[["I'm not sleeping well" ->3.14b]]
passages.cleanText: Come on, there must be *something*.

passages.name: 3.14a
passages.text: Well, how about I tell you about what I'm up to first. [[3.15a]]
passages.cleanText: Well, how about I tell you about what I'm up to first.

passages.name: 3.15a
passages.text:
I just finished reading *Of Mice and Monkeys*. It had a really sad ending. Have you ever read it? 
[["I have" -> 3.16a1]]
[["No, I haven't" -> 3.16a2]]
[["I've never heard of that book" -> 3.16a3]]
passages.cleanText: I just finished reading *Of Mice and Monkeys*. It had a really sad ending. Have you ever read it?

passages.name: 3.16a1
passages.text: Did you like the ending? I wasn't a fan of Lenny dying - killing gorillas at the end of the book is a little cliché. [[3.17a1]]
passages.cleanText: Did you like the ending? I wasn't a fan of Lenny dying - killing gorillas at the end of the book is a little cliché.

passages.name: 3.16a2
passages.text: Oh, you haven't? Well the Marty I know loves literature and he'd love it. [[3.21a]]
passages.cleanText: Oh, you haven't? Well the Marty I know loves literature and he'd love it.

passages.name: 3.17a1
passages.text: I mean, Of Mice and Monkeys is a literary staple of the entire canon of English literature, and anyways, clichés have to come from somewhere. [[3.18a1]]
passages.cleanText: I mean, Of Mice and Monkeys is a literary staple of the entire canon of English literature, and anyways, clichés have to come from somewhere.

passages.name: 3.18a1
passages.text: Even if it feels cliché, it's only because so many other works have copied the original. [[3.19a1]]
passages.cleanText: Even if it feels cliché, it's only because so many other works have copied the original.

passages.name: 3.19a1
passages.text: So you think the only way for the original to feel original is to turn the cliché on its head? [[3.20a1]]
passages.cleanText: So you think the only way for the original to feel original is to turn the cliché on its head?

passages.name: 3.20a1
passages.text: No. If something is parodied and satirized enough, it can be pretty cool. [[3.21a]]
passages.cleanText: No. If something is parodied and satirized enough, it can be pretty cool.

passages.name: 3.21a
passages.text: So, what's up with you? I know you're tired, but you usually aren't this uninterested. [[3.22a]]
passages.cleanText: So, what's up with you? I know you're tired, but you usually aren't this uninterested.

passages.name: 3.16a3
passages.text: Are you even Marty? What do you mean that you've never heard of one of the greatest pieces of literature? [[3.17a3]]
passages.cleanText: Are you even Marty? What do you mean that you've never heard of one of the greatest pieces of literature?

passages.name: 3.17a3
passages.text: I'm sorry, I'll get to it even- [[3.18a3]]
passages.cleanText: I'm sorry, I'll get to it even-

passages.name: 3.18a3
passages.text: It's fine. [[3.21a]]
passages.cleanText: It's fine.

passages.name: 3.22a
passages.text: I'm having a lot of trouble sleeping, more than yesterday. [[3.23a]]
passages.cleanText: I'm having a lot of trouble sleeping, more than yesterday.

passages.name: 3.23a
passages.text: What's been keeping you up? [[3.24]]
passages.cleanText: What's been keeping you up?

passages.name: 3.14b
passages.text: You do look a worse than yesterday. What's been keeping you up? [[3.24]]
passages.cleanText: You do look a worse than yesterday. What's been keeping you up?

passages.text: I think... I'd rather not talk about it. [[3.25]]
passages.cleanText: I think... I'd rather not talk about it.

passages.text: Are you sure? If you're overworked, we should probably deal with it now. [[3.26]]
passages.cleanText: Are you sure? If you're overworked, we should probably deal with it now.

passages.text: You know, before it REALLY becomes a problem. [[3.27]]
passages.cleanText: You know, before it REALLY becomes a problem.

passages.text: I.. think it already has. [[3.28]]
passages.cleanText: I.. think it already has.

passages.text: Well.. I think I saw something in the sky last night. [[3.30]]
passages.cleanText: Well.. I think I saw something in the sky last night.

passages.text:
Saw.. something? 
[["Something.. that wasn't real" -> 3.31a]]
[["The moon looked like a giant eye." -> 3.31b]]

links.linkText: "The moon looked like a giant eye."
links.original: [["The moon looked like a giant eye." -> 3.31b]]

passages.cleanText: Saw.. something?

passages.name: 3.31a
passages.text: How unreal are we talking? [[3.32a]]
passages.cleanText: How unreal are we talking?

passages.name: 3.31b
passages.text: Oh my goat, this is bad.. [[3.40]]
passages.cleanText: Oh my goat, this is bad..

passages.name: 3.32a
passages.text: I'd really rather not talk about this. [[3.33a]]
passages.cleanText: I'd really rather not talk about this.

passages.name: 3.33a
passages.text: No, Marty, look. This is a problem. [[3.34a]]
passages.cleanText: No, Marty, look. This is a problem.

passages.name: 3.34a
passages.text: If you're really seeing things, then your insomnia or exhaustion or something is playing tricks on you. [[3.35a]]
passages.cleanText: If you're really seeing things, then your insomnia or exhaustion or something is playing tricks on you.

passages.name: 3.35a
passages.text: Or maybe, I am just going crazy. Like.. you know.. Jonathan F. Smi- [[3.36a]]
passages.cleanText: Or maybe, I am just going crazy. Like.. you know.. Jonathan F. Smi-

passages.name: 3.36a
passages.text: No! you are not going crazy.  We're going to fix this. [[3.37a]]
passages.cleanText: No! you are not going crazy.  We're going to fix this.

passages.name: 3.37a
passages.text: I'll buy you some dinner, you'll go to bed at a reasonable time, and this will all go away. [[3.38a]]
passages.cleanText: I'll buy you some dinner, you'll go to bed at a reasonable time, and this will all go away.

passages.name: 3.38a
passages.text: But... out of curiosity... what did you see? [[3.39a]]
passages.cleanText: But... out of curiosity... what did you see?

passages.name: 3.39a
passages.text: Well, the moon looked like a giant eye. [[3.40]]
passages.cleanText: Well, the moon looked like a giant eye.
How so?

passages.text: The whites were black and the iris was the moon. It was looking directly at me, like the portal to the mind of some dark creature. [[3.42]]
passages.cleanText: The whites were black and the iris was the moon. It was looking directly at me, like the portal to the mind of some dark creature.

passages.text: Oh... I get why you didn't get any sleep. [[3.43]]
passages.cleanText: Oh... I get why you didn't get any sleep.

passages.text: Matthew, do you think it could mean something? [[3.44]]
passages.cleanText: Matthew, do you think it could mean something?

passages.text: What do you mean? [[3.45]]
passages.cleanText: What do you mean?

passages.text: Well, they say your dreams reflect your subconscious... [[3.46]]
passages.cleanText: Well, they say your dreams reflect your subconscious...

passages.text: I guess I'm asking... Do I think something watching us? [[3.47]]
passages.cleanText: I guess I'm asking... Do I think something watching us?

passages.text: Well, you WON'T be thinking that tomorrow, when you go to bed on time. [[3.49]]
passages.cleanText: Well, you WON'T be thinking that tomorrow, when you go to bed on time.

passages.text: Are you following Dr. Muffins's treatment? [[3.50]]
passages.cleanText: Are you following Dr. Muffins's treatment?

passages.text: Yes, I'm drinking honey tea everyday. [[3.51]]
passages.cleanText: Yes, I'm drinking honey tea everyday.

passages.text: Good. I'm sure that'll fix all of your.. problems. [[3.52]]
passages.cleanText: Good. I'm sure that'll fix all of your.. problems.

passages.text: I hope so. [[3.53]]
passages.cleanText: I hope so.

passages.text: But you feel like it won't. [[3.54]]
passages.cleanText: But you feel like it won't.

passages.text: You keep walking down Casserole Avenue and see Ms. Buttons. Her garden is as ripe as ever with blooming carrots. [[3.55]]
passages.cleanText: You keep walking down Casserole Avenue and see Ms. Buttons. Her garden is as ripe as ever with blooming carrots.

passages.tags: buttons-angry buttons-enter-right buttons-speaker excite marty-neutral marty_enter
passages.text: Took you long enough! I'm usually the one you stop by first. But I guess this old bunny's not your favorite anymore. [[3.56]]
passages.cleanText: Took you long enough! I'm usually the one you stop by first. But I guess this old bunny's not your favorite anymore.

passages.text: Sorry, Ms. Buttons. Here's your mail. [[3.57]]
passages.cleanText: Sorry, Ms. Buttons. Here's your mail.

passages.text: Thanks cupcake. Y'know, if you need a little pick-me-up, come by Bunalicious and get some cinnamon-carrot buns. [[3.58]]
passages.cleanText: Thanks cupcake. Y'know, if you need a little pick-me-up, come by Bunalicious and get some cinnamon-carrot buns.

passages.text: You know how my restaurant's got the best buns in all of Honey Haven! Just stop by- [[3.59]]
passages.cleanText: You know how my restaurant's got the best buns in all of Honey Haven! Just stop by-

passages.text: Thanks. [[3.60]]
passages.cleanText: Thanks.

passages.text: You usually find Ms. Buttons's excessive advertising amusing, but you're too tired today to entertain her. [[3.61]]
passages.cleanText: You usually find Ms. Buttons's excessive advertising amusing, but you're too tired today to entertain her.

passages.text:
You start contemplating escape routes from the conversation when you remember something. Something... odd. 
[[Question her -> 3.61a]]
[[Accuse her -> 3.61b]]
passages.cleanText: You start contemplating escape routes from the conversation when you remember something. Something... odd.

passages.name: 3.61a
passages.text: Hey Ms. Buttons, I just noticed your crops are growing back awfully fast. What are you doing with them? [[3.62a]]
passages.cleanText: Hey Ms. Buttons, I just noticed your crops are growing back awfully fast. What are you doing with them?

passages.name: 3.61b
passages.text: Your crops are growing back every night. You're either a witch, or you're hiding something. [[3.62b]]
passages.cleanText: Your crops are growing back every night. You're either a witch, or you're hiding something.

passages.name: 3.62a
passages.text: Only a bit of elbow grease and a green thumb. Or maybe it's just your eyes playing tricks on you. [[3.63a]]
passages.cleanText: Only a bit of elbow grease and a green thumb. Or maybe it's just your eyes playing tricks on you.

passages.name: 3.63a
passages.text: Maybe you should come to my restaurant later and see how they turn out. [[3.64]]
passages.cleanText: Maybe you should come to my restaurant later and see how they turn out.

passages.name: 3.62b
passages.text: Honey pie, just what in goat's name are you talking about. [[3.63b]]
passages.cleanText: Honey pie, just what in goat's name are you talking about.

passages.name: 3.63b
passages.text: If you think I'm a witch, then I must really be old and ugly! [[3.64]]
passages.cleanText: If you think I'm a witch, then I must really be old and ugly!

passages.text: Well then why is your carrot garden full every morning when you pick all the carrots the day before? [[3.65]]
passages.cleanText: Well then why is your carrot garden full every morning when you pick all the carrots the day before?

passages.text: Last I checked, plants don't do that. [[3.66]]
passages.cleanText: Last I checked, plants don't do that.

passages.text: Look, I don't know what you're accusing me of, but all my crops are organic and naturally home grown. [[3.67]]
passages.cleanText: Look, I don't know what you're accusing me of, but all my crops are organic and naturally home grown.

passages.text: Come eat at my restaurant and you can tell. Just come eat okay? I'll give you a 1% discount. [[3.68]]
passages.cleanText: Come eat at my restaurant and you can tell. Just come eat okay? I'll give you a 1% discount.

passages.text: Ms. Buttons, I know what I'm seeing. Your crops will be gone one day and back the next. [[3.69]]
passages.cleanText: Ms. Buttons, I know what I'm seeing. Your crops will be gone one day and back the next.
How?

passages.text: What, you think it's some sort of dark magic? Some wicked curse? [[3.71]]
passages.cleanText: What, you think it's some sort of dark magic? Some wicked curse?

passages.text: Stop being such a paranoid little freak. [[3.71.5]]
passages.cleanText: Stop being such a paranoid little freak.

passages.text: Sorry about that. I'll up your discount to 2%. [[3.73]]
passages.cleanText: Sorry about that. I'll up your discount to 2%.

passages.text: You both stare at each other for a minute. She clears her throat. [[3.72]]
passages.cleanText: You both stare at each other for a minute. She clears her throat.
But-

passages.text: Just drop it, okay? This conversation's over. [[3.75]]
passages.cleanText: Just drop it, okay? This conversation's over.

passages.text:
She hops away and gets to work on picking the carrots, which you bet you'll see again tomorrow. You feel...
[[Annoyed -> 3.76a]]
[[Extremely suspicious-> 3.76b]]
passages.cleanText: She hops away and gets to work on picking the carrots, which you bet you'll see again tomorrow. You feel...

passages.name: 3.76a
passages.text: annoyed that she was so defensive. Wait.. [[3.77a]]
passages.cleanText: annoyed that she was so defensive. Wait..

passages.name: 3.76b
passages.text: extremely suspicious. Plants don't grow in a day. That's just unrealistic. [[3.78]]
passages.cleanText: extremely suspicious. Plants don't grow in a day. That's just unrealistic.

passages.name: 3.77a
passages.text: defensive? You can't be defensive unless you're defending something. Hmm... [[3.78]]
passages.cleanText: defensive? You can't be defensive unless you're defending something. Hmm...

passages.text: You're in a bad and skeptical mood. You decide to shrug it off for now because you still have mail to deliver. [[3.79]]
passages.cleanText: You're in a bad and skeptical mood. You decide to shrug it off for now because you still have mail to deliver.

passages.text: You head to Pepper Lane to deliver mail to Mr. Scotch. As you turn onto the street, you get intercepted by a little cat. [[3.80]]
passages.cleanText: You head to Pepper Lane to deliver mail to Mr. Scotch. As you turn onto the street, you get intercepted by a little cat.

passages.tags: chester-enter-right chester-neutral chester-speaker marty-neutral marty_enter music_Who_Is_This_Kid
passages.text: So, did you see it last night? [[3.81]]
passages.cleanText: So, did you see it last night?

passages.text:
This question makes you flinch against your will. 
[["There was nothing to see." -> 3.82a]]
[["What do you think I saw?" -> 3.82b]]
passages.cleanText: This question makes you flinch against your will.

passages.name: 3.82b
passages.text: The monster of course, kekekeke... maybe an arm, a claw, or an eye... [[3.83]]
passages.cleanText: The monster of course, kekekeke... maybe an arm, a claw, or an eye...

passages.name: 3.82a
passages.text: Really? Then why do you look like a white mouse kekekekeke.. [[3.83]]
passages.cleanText: Really? Then why do you look like a white mouse kekekekeke..

passages.text:
I know you saw it.. was it under your bed? Or in the closet? 
[[Walk away -> 3.84a]]
[[Tell Chester off -> 3.84b]]
passages.cleanText: I know you saw it.. was it under your bed? Or in the closet?

passages.name: 3.84b
passages.text: Look kiddo, I don't have time for these games. Some of us adults have real things to do, and you need to be more respectful. [[3.85b]]
passages.cleanText: Look kiddo, I don't have time for these games. Some of us adults have real things to do, and you need to be more respectful.

passages.name: 3.84a
passages.text: You stop talking and walk past Chester, focused on getting to Mr. Scotch's no matter what. [[3.86]]
passages.cleanText: You stop talking and walk past Chester, focused on getting to Mr. Scotch's no matter what.

passages.name: 3.85b
passages.text: Before you can see Chester's reaction you turn your back to him and head to Mr. Scotch's home. [[3.86]]
passages.cleanText: Before you can see Chester's reaction you turn your back to him and head to Mr. Scotch's home.

passages.tags: big chester-angry chester-speaker excite flash shake
passages.text: I'm just telling you watch out! Because you're gonna disappear next!!! [[3.87]]
passages.cleanText: I'm just telling you watch out! Because you're gonna disappear next!!!

passages.text: You decide to ignore Chester and shove a weird, bubbling feeling down. You don't quite understand what it is. [[3.88]]
passages.cleanText: You decide to ignore Chester and shove a weird, bubbling feeling down. You don't quite understand what it is.

passages.tags: excite marty-enter marty-happy scotch-enter-right scotch-neutral tofu-enter-right tofu-neutral
passages.text: Your mood slightly betters when you see Mr. Scotch and Mrs. Tofu's smiling face. [[3.89]]
passages.cleanText: Your mood slightly betters when you see Mr. Scotch and Mrs. Tofu's smiling face.

passages.text: I've got a letter addressed to one "Mr. Scotch." [[3.90]]
passages.cleanText: I've got a letter addressed to one "Mr. Scotch."

passages.text: Sounds like a handsome fellow. I'll pass on the letter if I see him. [[3.91]]
passages.cleanText: Sounds like a handsome fellow. I'll pass on the letter if I see him.

passages.text: Hops! I can't have you losing your memory so early! [[3.92]]
passages.cleanText: Hops! I can't have you losing your memory so early!

passages.text: Who are you again? [[3.93]]
passages.cleanText: Who are you again?
Hops!

passages.text:
Just joking with you. Any news from you, Martin? 
[[Don't tell them anything -> 3.95a]]
[[Tell them that you're seeing things -> 3.95b]]

links.linkText: Tell them that you're seeing things

passages.cleanText: Just joking with you. Any news from you, Martin?

passages.name: 3.95a
passages.text: Nothing really. I'm just exhausted. [[3.96a]]
passages.cleanText: Nothing really. I'm just exhausted.

passages.name: 3.95b
passages.text: Um.. please don't tell anybody, but I think I'm seeing things. [[3.96b]]
passages.cleanText: Um.. please don't tell anybody, but I think I'm seeing things.

passages.name: 3.96a
passages.text: Are you sure? I've seen you walking around town, and it seems like something's troubling you. [[3.97a]]
passages.cleanText: Are you sure? I've seen you walking around town, and it seems like something's troubling you.

passages.name: 3.97a
passages.text: It's nothing, really. [[3.98a]]
passages.cleanText: It's nothing, really.

passages.name: 3.98a
passages.text: If you insist. But we've heard a lot of folks say things are fine, until it suddenly turns out they aren't. [[3.99a]]
passages.cleanText: If you insist. But we've heard a lot of folks say things are fine, until it suddenly turns out they aren't.

passages.name: 3.99a
passages.text: We just want to make sure you're alright. [[3.100a]]
passages.cleanText: We just want to make sure you're alright.

passages.name: 3.100a
passages.text: Thanks. I just need some rest. I've already got some honey tea from Dr. Muffins. [[3.101a]]
passages.cleanText: Thanks. I just need some rest. I've already got some honey tea from Dr. Muffins.

passages.name: 3.101a
passages.text: That's good. It might be wise to see him today, too.  [[3.102a]]
passages.cleanText: That's good. It might be wise to see him today, too.

passages.name: 3.96b
passages.cleanText: Oh my!

passages.name: 3.97b
passages.text: Are you sure, son? [[3.98b]]
passages.cleanText: Are you sure, son?

passages.name: 3.98b
passages.text: Something is watching me. It freaked me out. Makes me feel like this place is a little box of toys instead of a real town. [[3.99b]]
passages.cleanText: Something is watching me. It freaked me out. Makes me feel like this place is a little box of toys instead of a real town.

passages.name: 3.99b
passages.text: Dissociation. You're starting to think this place isn't real. [[3.100b]]
passages.cleanText: Dissociation. You're starting to think this place isn't real.

passages.name: 3.100b
passages.text: Son, you need to remember that this town IS real. What you're seeing isn't. [[3.101b]]
passages.cleanText: Son, you need to remember that this town IS real. What you're seeing isn't.

passages.name: 3.101b
passages.text: Keep your senses. You've been drinking honey tea, haven't you? [[3.102b]]
passages.cleanText: Keep your senses. You've been drinking honey tea, haven't you?

passages.name: 3.102b
passages.text: It will keep the worst of it away. But it seems you're still seeing things you're not supposed to. [[3.103b]]
passages.cleanText: It will keep the worst of it away. But it seems you're still seeing things you're not supposed to.

passages.name: 3.103b
passages.text:
Don't dance around it! Oh, Hops, we need to tell him! 
[["Tell me what?" -> 3.104]]
[["What's going on, I'm scared!" -> 3.104]]
passages.cleanText: Don't dance around it! Oh, Hops, we need to tell him!

passages.text: Oh Martin, there's a lot this town doesn't like to talk about. [[3.105]]
passages.cleanText: Oh Martin, there's a lot this town doesn't like to talk about.

passages.text: Lots of people go missing, you know? [[3.106]]
passages.cleanText: Lots of people go missing, you know?

passages.text: And it always starts like this, people being tired or scared. [[3.107]]
passages.cleanText: And it always starts like this, people being tired or scared.

passages.text: Then they start seeing things they shouldn't. [[3.108]]
passages.cleanText: Then they start seeing things they shouldn't.

passages.text: Then... they just.. disappear. [[3.109]]
passages.cleanText: Then... they just.. disappear.

passages.text: Just like.. [[3.110]]
passages.cleanText: Just like..

passages.text: Jonathan F. Smith, the poor boy. [[3.111]]
passages.cleanText: Jonathan F. Smith, the poor boy.

passages.text: He was just a teenager when it happened. [[3.112]]
passages.cleanText: He was just a teenager when it happened.

passages.text: I'm sure you've heard the stories. [[3.113]]
passages.cleanText: I'm sure you've heard the stories.

passages.text: He started seeing things and was never the same again. [[3.114]]
passages.cleanText: He started seeing things and was never the same again.

passages.text: Called it "the truth," even though nobody else saw or understood it. And so the town became afraid. [[3.115]]
passages.cleanText: Called it "the truth," even though nobody else saw or understood it. And so the town became afraid.

passages.text: But at the very least, we didn't lose him completely. Unlike Jill and Ben and.. so many more. [[3.116]]
passages.cleanText: But at the very least, we didn't lose him completely. Unlike Jill and Ben and.. so many more.

passages.text: My old heart can't bear any more goodbyes. [[3.117]]
passages.cleanText: My old heart can't bear any more goodbyes.

passages.text: We just want to make sure it won't happen to you. [[3.118]]
passages.cleanText: We just want to make sure it won't happen to you.

passages.text: ...and we're sure it won't. But one can never be too careful. [[3.119]]
passages.cleanText: ...and we're sure it won't. But one can never be too careful.

passages.text: Just don't go believing nonsensical things, Martin. [[3.120]]
passages.cleanText: Just don't go believing nonsensical things, Martin.

passages.text: It rarely ends well. [[3.121]]
passages.cleanText: It rarely ends well.

passages.text: ..thank you. I'll keep that in mind. [[3.122]]
passages.cleanText: ..thank you. I'll keep that in mind.

passages.text: And keep drinking that tea, won't you? [[3.123]]
passages.cleanText: And keep drinking that tea, won't you?

passages.text: You decide to take their advice and call up Dr. Muffins. He arrives at your home that evening. [[3.124]]
passages.cleanText: You decide to take their advice and call up Dr. Muffins. He arrives at your home that evening.

passages.name: 3.102a
passages.text:
Oh Hops, I can't take it anymore. I'm worried about him, and we need to tell him! 
[[3.103a]]
passages.cleanText: Oh Hops, I can't take it anymore. I'm worried about him, and we need to tell him!

passages.name: 3.103a
passages.text: Tell me what? [[3.104]]
passages.cleanText: Tell me what?

passages.text: There's a lot this town doesn't like to talk about. [[3.105]]
passages.cleanText: There's a lot this town doesn't like to talk about.

passages.tags: excite marty-neutral marty_enter muffins-enter-right muffins-happy muffins-speaker
passages.text: Hey Marty! How are you doing? [[3.125]]
passages.cleanText: Hey Marty! How are you doing?

passages.text: Just a bit tired. [[3.126]]
passages.cleanText: Just a bit tired.

passages.text: Oh, didn't sleep well last night? [[3.127]]
passages.cleanText: Oh, didn't sleep well last night?

passages.text: I.. had the dreams again. [[3.128]]
passages.cleanText: I.. had the dreams again.

passages.text:
Those should have gone away by now... 
[["How bad is it?" ->  3.131a]]
[["I'm sure it isn't a problem." -> 3.131b]]
[["I think they're more than dreams." -> 3.131c]]
passages.cleanText: Those should have gone away by now...

passages.name: 3.131a
passages.text: It's... a problem. [[3.132a]]
passages.cleanText: It's... a problem.

passages.name: 3.131b
passages.text: I wouldn't be so sure. What things are you seeing? [[3.132b]]
passages.cleanText: I wouldn't be so sure. What things are you seeing?

passages.name: 3.131c
passages.text:
You're.. what? 
[["I think they're visions." -> 3.131c1]]
[["Forget I said anything." -> 3.131c2]]
passages.cleanText: You're.. what?

passages.name: 3.132a
passages.text: ...listen Marty. This has happened before. It never goes well. [[3.133a]]
passages.cleanText: ...listen Marty. This has happened before. It never goes well.

passages.name: 3.133a
passages.text: Those dreams - *nightmares* - could be a disaster if we don't get them under control. [[3.134a]]
passages.cleanText: Those dreams - *nightmares* - could be a disaster if we don't get them under control.

passages.name: 3.134a
passages.text: Please.. tell me what you see in them. [[3.135a]]
passages.cleanText: Please.. tell me what you see in them.

passages.name: 3.132b
passages.text: I see- I FEEL like there's something watching. [[3.133b]]
passages.cleanText: I see- I FEEL like there's something watching.

passages.name: 3.133b
passages.text: Something that doesn't fit in our world, like it's imaginary.. or *otherworldly*. [[3.137]]
passages.cleanText: Something that doesn't fit in our world, like it's imaginary.. or *otherworldly*.

passages.name: 3.131c1
passages.cleanText: Oh Marty...

passages.name: 3.131c2
passages.text: No, Marty. This is important. More important than you can imagine. [[3.137]]
passages.cleanText: No, Marty. This is important. More important than you can imagine.

passages.name: 3.135a
passages.text: I see.. something watching. Something that doesn't fit in this world-- in Honey Haven. [[3.136a]]
passages.cleanText: I see... something watching. Something that doesn't fit in this world-- in Honey Haven.

passages.name: 3.136a
passages.text: I can't even describe it. It feels... *otherworldy*. [[3.137]]
passages.cleanText: I can't even describe it. It feels... *otherworldy*.

passages.text: I need you to listen to me. Don't believe what you see. Any of it. [[3.138]]
passages.cleanText: I need you to listen to me. Don't believe what you see. Any of it.

passages.text: You could put everything into jeopardy, Your life. The lives of others. This whole town. [[3.139]]
passages.cleanText: You could put everything into jeopardy, Your life. The lives of others. This whole town.

passages.text: You're a good mouse, and everyone's friend in Honey Haven, too. [[3.140]]
passages.cleanText: You're a good mouse, and everyone's friend in Honey Haven, too.

passages.text: We can't lose another like you to those... visions. [[3.141]]
passages.cleanText: We can't lose another like you to those... visions.

passages.text: D-doc, what.. what are you talking about? [[3.142]]
passages.cleanText: D-doc, what.. what are you talking about?

passages.text: This has happened before, Marty. [[3.143]]
passages.cleanText: This has happened before, Marty.

passages.text: People saying they see things. That they see *the truth*. [[3.144]]
passages.cleanText: People saying they see things. That they see *the truth*.

passages.text: Saying nothing around them is real. Start breaking things. [[3.145]]
passages.cleanText: Saying nothing around them is real. Start breaking things.
Then...

passages.text: they vanish. [[3.147]]
passages.cleanText: they vanish.

passages.text: We CAN'T let that happen to you. Not to another. [[3.148]]
passages.cleanText: We CAN'T let that happen to you. Not to another.

passages.text: D-d-doctor- [[3.149]]
passages.cleanText: D-d-doctor-

passages.text: Promise me not to listen to them, Marty! [[3.150]]
passages.cleanText: Promise me not to listen to them, Marty!

passages.text: Y-you're scaring me, doc.. [[3.151]]
passages.cleanText: Y-you're scaring me, doc..

passages.text: PROMISE ME! [[3.152]]
passages.cleanText: PROMISE ME!

passages.text: I... I promise! [[3.153]]
passages.cleanText: I... I promise!

passages.text: I'm sorry, Marty. [[3.155]]
passages.cleanText: I'm sorry, Marty.

passages.text: I've seen this happen too many times before. [[3.156]]
passages.cleanText: I've seen this happen too many times before.

passages.text: And I don't want you thinking like that, too. [[3.157]]
passages.cleanText: And I don't want you thinking like that, too.

passages.text: It just never ends well. [[3.158]]
passages.cleanText: It just never ends well.

passages.text: Just please, *please* keep drinking your tea. [[3.159]]
passages.cleanText: Just please, *please* keep drinking your tea.

passages.text: I.. I will, doc. I swear... [[3.160]]
passages.cleanText: I.. I will, doc. I swear...

passages.text: I think I need some water. [[3.161]]
passages.cleanText: I think I need some water.

passages.text: Goodbye, Marty. [[3.162]]
passages.cleanText: Goodbye, Marty.

passages.text: Dr. Muffins leaves. Your home is quiet again with just you. [[3.163]]
passages.cleanText: Dr. Muffins leaves. Your home is quiet again with just you.

passages.text: It's been another very, VERY long day. [[3.164]]
passages.cleanText: It's been another very, VERY long day.

passages.text: You just hope you can finally sleep tonight. [[3.165]]
passages.cleanText: You just hope you can finally sleep tonight.

passages.text: No stars for you tonight. Not after what happened last time. [[3.167]]
passages.cleanText: No stars for you tonight. Not after what happened last time.

passages.text: What DID happen last time? [[3.168]]
passages.cleanText: What DID happen last time?
That eye...

passages.text: You get into bed, pull up the covers, and try to sleep. You drift off into a sweet dream. [[3.170]]
passages.cleanText: You get into bed, pull up the covers, and try to sleep. You drift off into a sweet dream.

passages.text: Are you starting to understand? [[3.171]]
passages.cleanText: Are you starting to understand?

passages.text: Are you starting to believe? [[3.172]]
passages.cleanText: Are you starting to believe?

passages.text: They're lying to you. [[3.173]]
passages.cleanText: They're lying to you.

passages.text: All of them. [[3.174]]
passages.cleanText: All of them.

passages.text: If you don't know this now, you will soon. [[3.175]]
passages.cleanText: If you don't know this now, you will soon.

passages.text: And when you do, I'll be there to help. [[3.176]]
passages.cleanText: And when you do, I'll be there to help.

passages.text: Don't give up. See through the illusion. [[3.177]]
passages.cleanText: Don't give up. See through the illusion.

passages.text: See through Honey Haven. [[3.178]]
passages.cleanText: See through Honey Haven.

passages.text: Only then will you find the truth. [[3.179]]
passages.cleanText: Only then will you find the truth.

passages.text: End of Day 3.
passages.cleanText: End of Day 3.

passages.name: END
passages.text: back to menu
passages.cleanText: back to menu

passages.name: 3.169 minigame
passages.text: constellation minigame
passages.cleanText: constellation minigame
